name: astrojones-dev
description: The astrojones org plugin: nuklaut deploy knowledge, /new-app scaffolding (born harnessed), deploy-doctor CI diagnosis, plus the repo-agent-harness Claude Code surface — coding-workflow skills, subagents, safety-hook shims, and /harness-init. Bundles the repo-agent-harness MCP server — auto-connects at session start. Use /harness-init to scaffold agent/ config into each repo; pass --pin for a project .mcp.json (CI / non-CC clients only).
